positionAnalysis.thesis: Retail turnaround, 62% P/E discount to peers
Reverse mortgage leader, Blue Owl $2.5B partnership

watchFor: AVOID: Two consecutive sessions with vanishing volume/edge; edge may be fading or regime shift underway.
AVOID: Win rate under 40% on recent trades; strategy expectancy needs review.
tomorrowRules: Pre-market: rerun back-test on neutral-regime setups; if expectancy < 0.2R skip the day-trade book completely.
Post-entry: hard cap of three day-trades; after third loss, screen turns off to prevent revenge trading.

dailyLessons.gradingReason: Zero trades means zero mistakes, but also zero alpha; capital preservation is good, execution is nil.
keyLessons: If no high-conviction setup appears, flat is fine—document the filter criteria that kept you out so the process is repeatable.
Swing book still has five open positions; define a max heat plan (e.g., 1.5×ATR stop or 2% equity risk per swing) before market open tomorrow.

goodPatterns: No forced trades in a neutral regime; protected yesterday’s green day.

badPatterns: Two consecutive sessions with vanishing volume/edge; edge may be fading or regime shift underway.
